name: Buxton Rural West

locations.address:
Chapel-en-le-Frith Enquiry Office, 
Manchester Road, 
Chapel-en-le-Frith

description: This Safer Neighbourhood area covers the rural areas west of Buxton. It belongs to the High Peak Local Policing Unit. The area covers the Goyt Valley, Goyt Moor, Axe Edge and the area around Errwood Reservoir.
